mapper.sql: taskId, projectId, projectType, contractNo, taskTypeCode, taskTypeId, taskName, eventPlanHappenDate, eventPlanHappenDateENG, planStartTime, planEndTime, actualStartTime, eventActualFinishDate, priority, progress, progressDesc, status, parentId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, visibleFlag, deliverFileIds, customInfo, remark
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_project_task (taskId, projectId, projectType, contractNo, taskTypeCode, taskTypeId, taskName, eventPlanHappenDate, eventPlanHappenDateENG, planStartTime, planEndTime, actualStartTime, eventActualFinishDate, priority, progress, progressDesc, status, parentId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, visibleFlag, deliverFileIds, customInfo, remark) values (#{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskTypeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eventPlanHappenDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{eventPlanHappenDateENG,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{planStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{planEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{actualStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{eventActualFinishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{priority,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{visibleFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliverFileIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_project_task
taskId,
projectId,
projectType,
contractNo,
taskTypeCode,
taskTypeId,
taskName,
eventPlanHappenDate,
eventPlanHappenDateENG,
planStartTime,
planEndTime,

eventActualFinishDate,
priority,
progress,
progressDesc,
status,
parentId,
createTime,
createBy,
updateTime,
updateBy,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
visibleFlag,
deliverFileIds,
customInfo,
remark,
#{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON},
#{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update pm_project_task
projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contractNo = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
taskTypeCode = #{taskTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
taskTypeId = #{taskTypeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
taskName = #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
eventPlanHappenDate = #{eventPlanHappenDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
eventPlanHappenDateENG = #{eventPlanHappenDateENG,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
planStartTime = #{planStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
planEndTime = #{planEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
actualStartTime = #{actualStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
eventActualFinishDate = #{eventActualFinishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
progress = #{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER},
progressDesc = #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parentId = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
visibleFlag = #{visibleFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deliverFileIds = #{deliverFileIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}),
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where taskId = #{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_project_task set projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contractNo = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, taskTypeCode = #{taskTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, taskTypeId = #{taskTypeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, taskName = #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eventPlanHappenDate = #{eventPlanHappenDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, eventPlanHappenDateENG = #{eventPlanHappenDateENG,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, planStartTime = #{planStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, planEndTime = #{planEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, actualStartTime = #{actualStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, eventActualFinishDate = #{eventActualFinishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, priority = #{priority,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, progress = #{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER}, progressDesc = #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parentId = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, visibleFlag = #{visibleFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deliverFileIds = #{deliverFileIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}), remark = #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where taskId = #{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: (t.effectiveTo is null or t.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

if.if: (t.effectiveTo is null or t.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

trim.if: ( t.projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.contractNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.taskTypeCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.taskTypeId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.taskName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.priority like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.visibleFlag like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.deliverFileIds like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or t.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select: select count(1) from pm_project_task as t

select JSON_SET(IFNULL(t.`customInfo`, "{}"), '$.statusName', bd.basicDataName) as customInfo, t.*, concat(t.taskTypeCode, '-', t.taskTypeId) eventKeyStr, fbd.basicDataName eventValue from pm_project_task as t left join fnd_basic_data fbd on fbd.dataTypeCode = t.taskTypeCode and fbd.basicDataId = t.taskTypeId left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on t.`status` = bd.`basicDataId` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'processStatus'
select count(1) from pm_project_task as t
mapper.update:
UPDATE pm_project_task t SET eventActualFinishDate = NULL, customInfo = JSON_SET ( IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), '$.deliverCount', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pd WHERE t.`projectId` = pd.`projectId` AND t.`projectType` = pd.`projectType` AND t.`taskId` = pd.`taskId` AND ( pd.effectiveTo > NOW() OR pd.effectiveTo IS NULL )) )
t.projectId = #{projectId} AND t.taskId = #{taskId} AND t.projectType = #{projectType} AND t.taskTypeCode = #{taskTypeCode} AND t.taskTypeId = #{taskTypeId} AND
effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND ( effectiveTo > NOW() OR effectiveTo IS NULL )
